prompt: Photorealistic handheld-style indoor portrait, vertical frame. A young woman sits beside a floor-to-ceiling hotel window overlooking a city at night. She's in full cosplay: vivid royal-blue qipao-style bodice with metallic gold trim, puff sleeves, curved structured chest panels, high collar with frog closures, wide white embroidered waist sash, and a high-slit blue skirt with gold edging. Accessories: large white fabric hair buns with gold ribbon side pieces and small gold accents, pearl earrings, and oversized black wrist cuffs with silver spike studs. Face in idol-beauty cosplay style: porcelain skin with warm pink undertone, large glossy eyes, precise black winged eyeliner, vivid glossy red lips slightly parted. Dark brown-black hair in twin side buns with soft bangs. Direct eye contact, calm and lightly flirtatious expression. Lighting: strong frontal camera flash creates crisp white highlights across face and chest. Warm hotel ceiling lights cast soft amber shadows. City lights through the window are slightly out of focus. Camera feels like a phone or compact digital with direct flash, around 24-28mm equivalent. Background: white marble window ledge, white bedding, city lights scattered behind glass.
